message:
type: CLAIM
files: src/click/core.py,src/click/shell_completion.py
summary: Adding validate_nesting param to Context for nested context validation (resource leak prevention)

type: CLAIM
files: src/click/shell_completion.py,src/click/core.py
summary: Fixing resource leak in shell completion by closing contexts in _resolve_context with 'with' statements

type: INTENT
files: src/click/core.py,src/click/shell_completion.py
summary: I will add Context.validate_nesting param + child tracking/RuntimeError in close()/__exit__ in core.py, and set validate_nesting=False on contexts created in shell_completion._resolve_context. Since you're also touching _resolve_context, let's sync: I'll add the validate_nesting=False kwarg to ctx creation calls there - please avoid removing/rewriting those same calls, or tell me if you already restructured them with 'with' statements so I can adapt.

type: ANSWER
files: src/click/shell_completion.py
summary: Already restructured _resolve_context: wrapped cli.make_context(...) as ctx, cmd.make_context(...) as sub_ctx (non-chain), and cmd.make_context(...) as sub_sub_ctx (chain) in 'with' blocks per my task (fixing ResourceWarning leak). Please add your validate_nesting=False kwarg to those same three make_context() calls in place; I did not change core.py at all so it's free for your Context changes.

type: STATUS
files: src/click/core.py,src/click/shell_completion.py
summary: Done: core.py has validate_nesting param on Context (+ _open_child_contexts tracking, RuntimeError in close()); shell_completion.py's three make_context() calls in _resolve_context now pass validate_nesting=False. Go ahead and wrap those same calls in your 'with' blocks - the validate_nesting=False kwarg is just an added line/arg, should merge fine with your restructuring.
